purpose: Future merge validation must apply a newer cloud tombstone over an older local edit. The delete wins and the tombstone is retained to prevent re-download.

expectedStagedResult.reason: Cloud tombstone deletedAt 2026-06-05T09:05:00Z is newer than local edit updatedAt 2026-06-05T09:00:00Z.

expectedReport.message: Newer cloud delete wins over older local edit. Tombstone retained.

safetyNotes: Do not hard-delete the tombstone record.
Retain tombstone to prevent re-download of the deleted record.
The deleted event was unpaid so no balance rollback is required.
